data.title: AROA Biosurgery Completes Randomised Controlled Trial for Symphony™; Preliminary Read-Out indicates Primary Endpoint Met
data.description: In Auckland, New Zealand on March 29, 2026, Aroa Biosurgery Limited revealed the successful conclusion of its randomised controlled trial assessing Symphony. The preliminary results of the study show that the trial met its main goal. Symphony, a cellular product by AROA...

data.title: Stewart Cink Wins the 2026 Hoag Classic at Newport Beach Country Club
data.description: The prestigious Hoag Classic, an exclusive PGA TOUR Champions tournament in Orange County, took place at the Newport Beach Country Club on March 29, 2026. The event showcased championship golf, community activities, and philanthropic initiatives. This gathering attracted significant attention, drawing in a large crowd of golf enthusiasts and supporters. The tournament served as a platform for promoting both professional sportsmanship and charitable endeavors, reinforcing its pivotal role in the community.

data.title: iScreen Introduces Bible-Themed Widgets for Easter: Daily Verses and an Immersive Reading Experience
data.description: Get ready to embrace the spirit of Easter with iScreen's latest Bible widgets, featuring a variety of daily verses, captivating video lock screens, and customizable home screen layouts. Recently launched in Los Angeles on March 27, 2026, iScreen, a renowned widget app for iPhone users worldwide, presents an array of innovative features to enhance your Easter celebrations. Whether you seek inspiration through daily scriptures or wish to personalize your device with unique lock screen designs, iScreen has you covered. Join the Easter festivities with iScreen's Bible widgets and elevate your iPhone experience.
